Issues: The design is highly complex and colorful, requiring a premium, high-resolution all-over print (AOP) application to ensure color saturation and minimal fading.

Ensure the chosen product listing accurately specifies the print method (e.g., sublimation for bright colors on certain fabric types) to manage customer expectations regarding durability and color fidelity.
While the design is beautiful, if printing on a synthetic fabric that doesn't accept dye well, certain vibrant colors may need to be adjusted for optimal print transfer.
